title: Multidriven warning with both drivers being the same line

features.name: concat assignment with interface signal and non-interface signal
features.description: Code should include an assignment where the right-hand side is a concatenation of a non-interface variable followed by an interface signal reference

features.name: module temp variable assigned from concat with interface
features.description: Code should include a module temporary variable assigned from a concatenation containing both a regular variable and an interface signal
